headline: Generating income for retirement: Here's what to know
summary: Americans are increasingly worried retirement will be less secure for them than it was for their parents, according to new survey data from BlackRock. CNBC's Sharon Epperson joins 'Squawk Box' with the details.

headline: Annuity options are growing in 401(k)s, but adoption remains limited
summary: Annuity options are gaining ground in 401(k)s, amid worker concerns about retirement income and longevity risks.
